title: Luffy Takes on Mohji and Richie
description: On pages 10–13, Luffy confronts Mohji and Richie after their intimidation exposes the cruelty of Buggy’s pirates.
scene: Mohji and Richie try to use fear and force, but Luffy’s reaction turns the scene into a direct challenge against their bullying.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: 01 Buggy... Let's celebrate together! We found a weird treasure, too!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: W... W... Whaddya mean treasure... I didn't do anything at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't know any- thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Whatcha talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We too one day,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: will get off this ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course we will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If I get to have my own ship

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm plan- ning to go around and see the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As a pirate, of course

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hehehng!! Talking absolute nonsense as usual

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: OH YEAH!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can understand and accept your fight- ing skills

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it weren't for your crazy way of thinking I wouldn't mind taking you in as my crew member...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your lol- lower!? Like I want to be!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: because we think so differently we just need to travel the path that each thinks best

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's what a pirate life is like!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Haha- haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's funny to hear things about pirates from your mouth...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But if that happens... then when we meet each other at sea again... we'll meet as enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yep

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's just another part of a pirate's life

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ....what the hell you're talking about...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, didn't you just say something about some weird treasure?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm... yes, we've got this "devil's fruit"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If you eat it you'll gain a special ability, but you won't be able to swim

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The captain said that whoever wants to eat it can have it......

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kuhahahaha! Don't wanna eat that sorta thing and end up unable to swim for the rest of my life...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hueh... scary... anyone who eats that sort of things is no doubt a real idiot

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If there's a treasure lying on the seabed and you can't swim, then you can't go and get it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But that odd fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Turns out it 7 sells for around 100 million Bell if you can believe it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What? Is that true!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If it's one hundred million bell then it's more than the selling price of 10 a-ranked treasure boxes!! The treasure goddess must be smiling down at me right now!!

summary: This part pushes Luffy from casual involvement into righteous anger, especially when innocent people and loyal companions are hurt.
